title: Weekly Cash Flow Monitor
summary: A weekly check on your cash position, receivables, and upcoming payments. Catch cash flow problems before they become crises.

steps.title: Check all bank balances
steps.description: Log in and note: current balance in each account, any large unexpected debits, pending transactions.

steps.title: Review outstanding receivables
steps.description: Check all unpaid invoices. Flag: overdue invoices (send reminder), invoices due this week (confirm payment), large invoices coming due (verify no issues).

steps.title: Preview upcoming expenses
steps.description: Check what large payments are due in the next 2 weeks: payroll, rent, annual subscriptions, tax payments, vendor invoices.

steps.title: Calculate net cash position
steps.description: Net position = current cash + expected inflows this week - expected outflows this week. If this goes below your comfort threshold, take action.

kpis.target: No invoice overdue by more than 14 days without follow-up

whenToImplement: Immediately. Even if you have plenty of cash, the habit prevents surprises.
delegationNotes: Can be delegated to a bookkeeper or EA once the format is established. Founder should still review the summary weekly.
automationNotes: Set up automatic balance alerts for low thresholds. Use accounting software reports for receivables ageing.
